title: oncidium xanthornis
intro: Oncidium xanthornis, also known as the yellow orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as skin infections and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Oncidium xanthornis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
